Text: I had the pleasure of working with Amit at Infomatrix, where he led the Salesforce practice while I was heading Sales. We collaborated on several projects, demos, and POCs, and I was always impressed with his strong technical approach and the way he handled customer requirements.  Amit has deep Salesforce expertise and has successfully delivered many complex implementations across different industries. He brings clarity to complex problems, ensures seamless execution, and always keeps customer success at the center.  Amit is a hardworking and dedicated professional. Any organization would be fortunate to have him on board.

Job Title: Digital Transformation Leader , Salesforce CRM Program Architect
Text: I had the pleasure of working closely with Amit on multiple Salesforce projects during his tenure in HCL Technologies, and I can confidently say that he is an exceptional professional who consistently delivers outstanding results. His expertise spans from hands-on development to high-level architectural design, demonstrating a rare blend of technical depth and strategic vision.  As a Salesforce SME, Amit showed meticulous attention to detail and a deep understanding of the Salesforce platform, delivering scalable and efficient solutions. Transitioning seamlessly into leadership roles, he effectively managed teams, driving collaboration and inspiring high performance. His architectural insights ensured our implementations were robust, future-proof, and aligned perfectly with business goals.  What truly sets Amit apart is his excellent client management skills. He engages with stakeholders confidently and transparently, bridging the gap between technical teams and business users. His ability to understand client needs and translate them into actionable solutions has been invaluable.  If you are looking for a Salesforce professional who combines technical prowess, leadership, and client-facing excellence, I highly recommend Amit. He is a tremendous asset to any team or organization.

Working under Amit’s leadership has been one of the most rewarding experiences of my professional career. He is a visionary Salesforce Architect who combines deep technical expertise with the ability to lead and inspire teams toward excellence.  From a technical standpoint, Amit brings a rare depth of knowledge across the Salesforce ecosystem. He has a mastery of data modeling, integration patterns, security design, and scalable architecture principles. I have witnessed him design frameworks that not only address immediate requirements but are also forward-looking—ensuring performance, maintainability, and alignment with best practices. He is especially strong in identifying reusable patterns and components, reducing delivery effort significantly while maintaining high quality.  Amit’s ability to evaluate complex business requirements and translate them into robust, scalable, and future-ready Salesforce solutions is remarkable. He is equally skilled in areas like DevOps, release management, automation, and leveraging AI-driven accelerators to enhance productivity. His holistic view of architecture ensures that solutions are not just technically sound but also aligned with long-term organizational goals.  Beyond his technical brilliance, Amit is a mentor in the truest sense. Reporting to him has allowed me to grow both technically and professionally. He creates an environment where learning is constant—whether it’s encouraging exploration of new Salesforce features, reviewing architectural decisions in detail, or guiding on how to balance trade-offs in design. His feedback is always constructive, precise, and rooted in years of hands-on experience.  Another standout quality is his ability to lead diverse teams with empathy and clarity. Amit fosters collaboration across different functions, ensuring that everyone contributes meaningfully. He sets high standards but also empowers individuals to reach them with confidence and support.  What I admire most about Amit is that he balances technical rigor with human leadership. He can deep-dive into a complex integration challenge one moment and, in the next, provide guidance that uplifts the entire team.  I can confidently say Amit is one of the finest leaders and architects I have worked with. His technical excellence, vision, and mentorship make him an invaluable asset to any organization
